intro: First Five unlocks five Streamer.bot-owned Twitch rewards in order. One viewer may claim only one placement per stream. Placement scores accumulate in a compact monthly leaderboard: 1st=5, 2nd=4, 3rd=3, 4th=2, 5th=1.

sections.title: 1. Connect the five rewards
sections.description: Use five unique rewards created and owned by Streamer.bot. Initially enable only the first reward.

sections.title: 2. Reward titles
sections.description: Set the available title for each placement and the title shown after a viewer claims it.

sections.title: 3. Twitch chat messages
sections.description: Successful claims can be announced. Repeat-claim notices are off by default to prevent chat spam.

sections.title: 4. Monthly leaderboard
sections.description: The stream placements reset each stream. Weighted scores reset on the first event of a new local-calendar month.

sections.title: Privacy and storage
sections.description: First Five stores Twitch user IDs, current display names, placement counts, and compact timestamps in its private atomic state. It stores no chat text, tokens, SlothCoins, or point balances.
sections.notice: Import the separate First Five Streamer.bot package. Keep Controller triggerless, approve it for this add-on, and optionally attach Reset to a deck button. Trigger tests and simulated reward events never change live rewards.
